title: Invisible Prompts
relevance_summary: Malicious Solidity IDE extension with fake downloads to deceive developers

prevention.rule: Block any tx that installs a Solidity IDE extension with suspicious activity

red_flags: Fake Solidity IDE extension with high downloads
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that installs a Solidity IDE extension with suspicious activity
summary: A Russian developer lost $500,000 due to a malicious Solidity IDE extension with fake downloads and remote access backdoors. A guard could prevent such attacks by blocking any transaction that installs a Solidity IDE extension with suspicious activity.
